# Architecture Blueprint

<!-- mol:map:managed begin -->
<!-- This block is regenerated by /mol:map. Custom annotations go
     OUTSIDE these markers and are preserved across re-runs. -->

_Generated 2026-06-10 by /mol:map._

## Inventory

### Module list

- **core** — Data-model foundation. `Atomistic`/`CoarseGrain` are handle-views that **subclass** the molrs Rust world (`class Atomistic(molrs.Atomistic, _GraphViews)`, `class CoarseGrain(molrs.CoarseGrain, _GraphViews)`); `Entity`/`Link` are dict-like views over molrs ECS nodes with identity hashing (`id(self)`). Holds `ForceField` + style/type hierarchy, `Box`, `Topology`, `Trajectory`, `Script`, `UnitSystem`, field formatters (`fields.py`), region/selector helpers. `core/ops/` holds pure-Python geometry helpers; `_handle.py`/`_columns.py` implement the molrs column ↔ Python-overflow proxy.
- **core/frame.py** — Thin re-export shim. After the `frame-block-sink` cutover, molpy no longer subclasses Frame/Block: `from molrs import Block, Frame`. Identity contract is `molpy.core.frame.Frame is molrs.Frame`. No `_inner`, no `to_molrs()`/`from_molrs()`, and no `core/_molrs.py` (does not exist).
- **adapter** — In-memory/file conversion to external libs (RDKit, OpenBabel). Data sync only; MUST NOT exec binaries. Optional imports with `None` fallbacks.
- **builder** — System assembly. `crystal.py` (lattice/site builders) plus `builder/polymer/` (declarative `polymer()`/`polymer_system()` DSL, connectors, placers, sequence generators, distributions, AmberTools polymer). Major teardown: `polymer_builder.py`, `stochastic.py`, `stochastic_generator.py`, `growth_kernel.py`, `residue_manager.py`, `selectors.py`, `ambertools/polymer_amber.py` were deleted; `PolymerBuilder`/`PolymerBuildResult` now live in `polymer/core.py`.
- **cli** — Command-line entry point (`molpy.cli:main`); `moltemplate.py` subcommand.
- **compute** — Trajectory/structure analysis operators. RDF, MSD, MCD, PMSD, neighborlist, cluster, density, diffraction, shape, order, PMFT, JACF, Onsager, persistence, time-series, workflow DAG. Recently added dielectric spectroscopy (`dielectric.py`: ACFAnalyzer, SpectralAnalyzer, DielectricSusceptibility, IonicConductivity) and matching result types.
- **conformer** — 3D conformer generation; `Conformer` subclasses `molrs.Conformer`, marshals `Atomistic` across the molrs boundary and re-adopts via `Atomistic.adopt`. Report types re-exported from molrs.
- **data** — Built-in resource access (`get_path`, `list_files`, `forcefield/`).
- **embed** — Empty (placeholder package, no modules).
- **engine** — MD/QM engine abstractions: `Engine` ABC + LAMMPS, CP2K, OpenMM. Generate-only or generate-and-run modes, launcher support.
- **io** — File I/O. Reader/Writer classes + `read_*`/`write_*` factory functions for PDB, GRO, XYZ, MOL2, LAMMPS data/molecule, AMBER (prmtop/inpcrd/ac), GROMACS top, XSF, HDF5; trajectory readers/writers; LAMMPS log parsers; force-field readers/writers. Subpackages `data/`, `forcefield/`, `trajectory/`, `log/`, `emit/`, `store/`, `amber/`.
- **legacy** — Retained pure-NumPy `MSD`/`DisplacementCorrelation` operators for direct NDArray workflows; maintained trunk is `compute`.
- **op** — NumPy geometry ops (`rotate_by_rodrigues`, `rotate_by_quaternion`, `translate`, `rotation_matrix_from_vectors`) re-exported via `from .geometry import *`.
- **optimize** — ASE-style geometry optimization: `Optimizer`, `OptimizationResult`, `LBFGS`, plus potential wrappers.
- **pack** — Packing workflows: `Molpack`, Packmol packer + `get_packer`, geometric constraints, `Target`.
- **parser** — Grammar-based parsing (Lark) for SMILES/SMARTS/BigSMILES/GBigSMILES/CGSmiles; convenience free-functions `parse_molecule`/`parse_polymer`/`parse_smarts`; singleton `SmartsParser`.
- **potential** — Potential functions for bond/angle/dihedral/improper/pair; `Potential`/`Potentials` base, parameter extraction utils. Subpackages auto-register implementations.
- **reacter** — Template-based reaction framework (SMIRKS-style on native structures). `Reacter`, `BondReactReacter`, `BondReactTemplate`, `TopologyDetector`, anchor/leaving selectors, bond transformers.
- **tool** — Empty (placeholder package).
- **typifier** — Atom typing engines: OPLS, GAFF, force-field typifiers (atom/bond/angle/dihedral/pair), `LayeredTypingEngine`, `DependencyAnalyzer`, SMARTS graph matcher.
- **wrapper** — External binary wrappers (subprocess only, no domain logic): `Wrapper`, `AntechamberWrapper`, `PrepgenWrapper`, `Parmchk2Wrapper`, `TLeapWrapper`.

### Public surface (key symbols)

- **molpy (top)**: re-exports submodules `adapter, data, engine, io, legacy, parser, potential, typifier`; core types `Angle, Atom, Atomistic, Bond, Dihedral, Improper, Box, Bead, CGBond, CoarseGrain, Entity, Link`; forcefield `ForceField, AtomisticForcefield, Style, Type, TypeBucket, Parameters, {Atom,Bond,Angle,Dihedral,Improper,Pair}{Style,Type}`; `Block, Frame, Script, ScriptLanguage, Topology, Trajectory, UnitSystem, version, release_date`; plus `potential.*`.
- **core**: same atomistic/forcefield/box/cg/frame/topology/unit symbols (no `Trajectory` in `core.__init__` `__all__`, but exported at top level via `core.trajectory`).
- **core.frame**: `Block, Frame` (both are the molrs types verbatim).
- **adapter**: `Adapter`; optionally `RDKitAdapter, MP_ID, Generate3D, OptimizeGeometry, generate_3d`, `OpenBabelAdapter` (guarded by `_HAS_RDKIT`/`_HAS_OPENBABEL`).
- **builder**: `polymer, polymer_system, prepare_monomer, generate_3d, PrepareMonomer, BuildPolymer, BuildPolymerAmber, BuildSystem, PlanSystem, AmberPolymerBuilder, build_crystal, Lattice, Site, BoxRegion, Cube, SphereRegion, Region`.
- **builder.polymer**: `Connector, ConnectorContext, Placer, LinearOrienter, CovalentSeparator, VdWSeparator, PolymerBuilder, PolymerBuildResult, SequenceGenerator, WeightedSequenceGenerator, DPDistribution, MassDistribution, FlorySchulzPolydisperse, PoissonPolydisperse, SchulzZimmPolydisperse, UniformPolydisperse, Chain, PolydisperseChainGenerator, SystemPlan, SystemPlanner` + DSL entry functions.
- **compute**: `Compute`; results `Result, TimeSeriesResult, MCDResult, PMSDResult, OnsagerResult, JACFResult, PersistResult, ACFResult, SpectralResult, DielectricResult, DielectricSusceptibilityResult, ConductivityResult, DebyeFit`; ops `MCDCompute, PMSDCompute, Onsager, JACF, Persist, ACFAnalyzer, SpectralAnalyzer, DielectricSusceptibility, IonicConductivity, NeighborList, RDF, MSD, Cluster, ClusterCenters, ClusterProperties, CenterOfMass, GyrationTensor, InertiaTensor, RadiusOfGyration, Pca, KMeans, DescriptorRow, Steinhardt, Hexatic, Nematic, SolidLiquid, LocalDensity, GaussianDensity, StaticStructureFactorDebye, BondOrder, PMFTXY, TimeCache, TimeAverage`; workflow `Workflow, Workflow{Cycle,DuplicateNode,MissingInput,}Error`; `compute_msd, compute_acf`.
- **conformer**: `Conformer` (subclasses `molrs.Conformer`), `ConformerReport, ConformerStageReport` (re-exported from molrs).
- **data**: `get_path, list_files`; `data.forcefield.get_forcefield_path`.
- **engine**: `Engine, LAMMPSEngine, CP2KEngine, OpenMMEngine, OpenMMSimulationConfig`.
- **io**: `PathLike`; `read_*` factories (`read_pdb, read_gro, read_xyz, read_mol2, read_top, read_xsf, read_h5, read_amber{,_ac,_inpcrd,_prmtop}, read_lammps_{data,molecule,trajectory,forcefield}, read_LAMMPS_log, read_xml_forcefield, read_{pdb,xyz,h5}_trajectory`); `write_*` factories (incl. `write_lammps_bond_react_system, write_lammps_system`); Reader/Writer classes (`DataReader/Writer`, `PDBReader/Writer`, `LammpsDataReader/Writer`, etc.); force-field `ForceFieldReader/Writer` + `AmberPrmtopReader, GromacsTopReader, LAMMPSForceFieldReader/Writer, MolTemplateReader, XMLForceFieldReader, OPLSAAForceFieldReader`; trajectory + LAMMPS-log classes; `read_txt`.
- **legacy**: `MSD, msd, DisplacementCorrelation, displacement_correlation`.
- **op**: `rotate_by_rodrigues, rotate_by_quaternion, translate, rotation_matrix_from_vectors`.
- **optimize**: `Optimizer, OptimizationResult, LBFGS`.
- **pack**: `Molpack, Packmol, get_packer, Target, Constraint, AndConstraint, OrConstraint, InsideBoxConstraint, OutsideBoxConstraint, InsideSphereConstraint, OutsideSphereConstraint, MinDistanceConstraint`.
- **parser**: `SmartsParser, parse_smiles, parse_bigsmiles, parse_gbigsmiles, parse_cgsmiles, parse_smarts, parse_molecule, parse_mixture, parse_monomer, parse_polymer, smilesir_to_atomistic, bigsmilesir_to_monomer, bigsmilesir_to_polymerspec, PolymerSpec, PolymerSegment`.
- **potential**: `Potential, Potentials` + submodules `angle, bond, dihedral, improper, pair` (each star-exported).
- **reacter**: `Reacter, ReactionResult, BondReactReacter, BondReactResult, BondReactTemplate, TopologyDetector`; transformers `break_bond, create_bond_former, form_{single,double,triple,aromatic}_bond, skip_bond_formation`; selectors `select_port, select_c_neighbor, select_o_neighbor, select_dehydration_{left,right}, select_all_hydrogens, select_dummy_atoms, select_hydroxyl_group, select_hydroxyl_h_only, select_none, select_one_hydrogen, Selector, select_self, select_hydrogens, select_neighbor`; `find_port_atom`/`find_port`, `create_atom_mapping, find_neighbors`.
- **typifier**: `DependencyAnalyzer, LayeredTypingEngine, OplsTypifier, GaffTypifier, PairTypifier` (public). One full-pipeline class per force field; the orchestrator base `ForceFieldTypifier`, the generic `ForceFieldBondTypifier/AngleTypifier/DihedralTypifier`, and the per-FF atom typifiers `_OplsAtomTypifier/_GaffAtomTypifier` are module-internal (importable from their modules but not exported from the package).
- **wrapper**: `Wrapper, AntechamberWrapper, Parmchk2Wrapper, PrepgenWrapper, TLeapWrapper, write_prepgen_control_file`.
- **cli**: `main`.

### Style summary

- **Naming**: snake_case functions/modules, PascalCase classes; private helpers `_leading_underscore`; reader/writer pairs named `<Format>Reader`/`<Format>Writer` with `read_<fmt>`/`write_<fmt>` factory functions; the public typifier for each force field is named `<FF>Typifier` (one full-pipeline class per force field; internal per-level helpers are `_leading_underscore`).
- **Construction**: direct class instantiation (no global singletons except `parser._smarts_parser`); factory functions wrap classes for ergonomics; builders use declarative DSL entry points (`polymer()`, `polymer_system()`); engines/wrappers configured by constructor args.
- **Error-handling**: optional deps imported in `try/except` with `None`/`_HAS_*` flags (adapter, openbabel); fail-fast `ValueError` on invalid input (e.g. `Conformer.generate` empty molecule); workflow defines a dedicated error hierarchy (`WorkflowError` subclasses); molrs write boundary rejects object/None/ragged columns fail-fast (`molrs.BlockDtypeError`).
- **Mutation semantics** (verified in `core/atomistic.py`): the core data-model API mutates in place and returns `self` for chaining — `move` (`molrs.translate(self, …); return self`), `rotate` (`molrs.rotate(self, …); return self`), `scale` (loops over atoms, returns self), `merge` returns `Self`. `def_atom`/`def_bond` mutate and return the created entity. `.copy()` is the explicit deep-copy opt-in. `Frame`/`Block` are molrs types and mutate the underlying Rust Store. Higher-level helpers (op, builder, reacter, conformer) avoid mutating caller input — e.g. `Conformer.generate` notes molrs clones internally and returns a fresh `Atomistic` via `adopt`. Identity-based hashing (`id(self)`) for `Entity`/`Link`.

### Layer roles

| Package | Layer (per "Architecture Overview" / typical workflow) |
|---|---|
| core | Data-model foundation (Entity/Link/Struct, Frame/Block, ForceField) — base layer, molrs-backed |
| core.frame / Block, Frame | Numerical container layer — re-exported verbatim from molrs Rust backend |
| parser | Stage 1 — parse → Atomistic |
| builder | Stage 1/2 — build & transform (system assembly) |
| reacter | Stage 2 — transform (template reactions) |
| op | Stage 2 — geometry transform primitives |
| conformer | Stage 2 — 3D structure generation (molrs-backed) |
| typifier | Stage 3 — assign force-field types |
| io | Stage 4 — export/import (file I/O boundary, canonicalize/localize) |
| wrapper | Stage 4 — external binary execution (subprocess only) |
| adapter | Stage 4 — external-library data bridges (no exec) |
| engine | Stage 4 — MD/QM engine abstractions |
| pack | Stage 4 — packing workflows (Packmol) |
| potential | Support layer — potential functions (consumed by optimize/engine) |
| optimize | Stage 5 — geometry optimization |
| compute | Stage 5 — analysis operators (trunk) |
| legacy | Stage 5 — retained NumPy analysis (superseded by compute) |
| data | Support layer — bundled resources |
| cli | Top-level entry point |
| embed | Empty placeholder |
| tool | Empty placeholder |

### molrs dependency

- Hard runtime dependency pinned at `molcrafts-molrs>=0.0.18` in `pyproject.toml`.
- `Frame`/`Block` ARE molrs types: `molpy.core.frame` does `from molrs import Block, Frame` (no subclass, no `_inner`, no `to_molrs()`/`from_molrs()` bridge); `core/_molrs.py` does not exist. Object/None/ragged columns are rejected fail-fast at write time (`molrs.BlockDtypeError`).
- `Atomistic`/`CoarseGrain` subclass `molrs.Atomistic`/`molrs.CoarseGrain` (native pyo3 base must be first in MRO) and ARE molrs worlds, accepted directly by `molrs.*` free functions (`molrs.translate`, `molrs.rotate`). `Atomistic.adopt(graph: molrs.Atomistic)` re-wraps a Rust graph.
- `Entity`/`Link` are handle-views over molrs ECS nodes; scalar columns route to molrs component columns (`core/_handle.py`, `core/_columns.py`), bool/object overflow kept Python-side.
- `Conformer` subclasses `molrs.Conformer`; `ConformerReport`/`ConformerStageReport` re-exported from molrs unchanged.

### Key architectural patterns

- **Adapter + registry**: external libs wrapped per-class under `adapter/`/`wrapper/` with optional import + graceful fallback; adapters do data sync only, wrappers do subprocess execution only — domain logic belongs in compute nodes.
- **ForceField I/O hierarchy**: `ForceFieldReader`/`ForceFieldWriter` ABCs with per-format subclasses.
- **Formatter hierarchy** (`core/fields.py`): `FieldSpec → FieldFormatter → ForceFieldFormatter`; readers `canonicalize()` at exit, writers `localize_frame()` at entry; per-format subclasses live in their own I/O module; `__init_subclass__` isolates registries.
- **Mutation + explicit `.copy()`**: core API mutates in place and chains via `self`; helpers copy-first.
- **Declarative builder DSL**: `polymer()`/`polymer_system()` entry points over a three-layer (Chain → SystemPlanner → BuildSystem) architecture; `PolymerBuilder` retained for direct graph assembly.
